example: A loose servo made the actuator hard to verify on site.
exampleZh: 一个松动的伺服让 actuator 在现场难以验证。

example: The technician ran diagnostics before swapping any parts.
exampleZh: 技术员在更换任何零件前先跑了 diagnostics。

example: You need to recalibrate the arm after changing the joint module.
exampleZh: 更换关节模块后你需要 recalibrate 机械臂。

example: The fault only appears when the robot runs at full speed for more than ten minutes.
exampleZh: fault 只在机器人全速运行超过十分钟时才出现。

example: The alarm history shows an overcurrent event on axis three at 9:42 this morning.
exampleZh: alarm 记录显示今早 9:42 在三轴上有一个过流事件。

example: The error code on the teach pendant is SRVO-062 which points to a brake issue.
exampleZh: 示教器上的 error code 是 SRVO-062 指向一个制动器问题。

example: Please send the alarm history from the last 48 hours so we can see the sequence of events.
exampleZh: 请发送过去 48 小时的 alarm history 让我们能看到事件顺序。

example: Intermittent faults are the hardest to troubleshoot because the problem disappears when you try to measure it.
exampleZh: intermittent fault 最难排查因为当你试图测量时问题就消失了。

example: The communication fault comes and goes which suggests a loose cable or a damaged connector.
exampleZh: communication fault 时有时无这暗示可能是线缆松动或接头损坏。

example: The encoder fault on axis two keeps appearing after the robot warms up for about twenty minutes.
exampleZh: 二轴的 encoder fault 在机器人热身约二十分钟后持续出现。

example: A servo fault on the wrist axis suggests we need to check the cable harness first.
exampleZh: 手腕轴的 servo fault 表明我们需要先检查 cable harness。

example: Start the troubleshooting by checking the simplest things first: power cables connectors and fuses.
exampleZh: 从最简单的东西开始 troubleshooting：电源线、接头和保险丝。

example: We replaced the drive twice but never found the root cause of the overcurrent events.
exampleZh: 我们换了两次驱动器但从未找到过流事件的 root cause。

example: There is a workaround that keeps the line running while we wait for the replacement part to arrive.
exampleZh: 有一个 workaround 可以在我们等待替换件到达期间保持产线运行。

example: The sensor keeps dropping out for a few milliseconds which is enough to trigger a stop.
exampleZh: 传感器持续 dropout 几毫秒这足以触发停机。

example: The timeout on the safety signal suggests the safety PLC is not getting a response from the robot controller.
exampleZh: 安全信号的 timeout 表明安全 PLC 没有收到 robot controller 的响应。

example: The preventive maintenance schedule says we need to replace the gearbox oil every 4000 hours.
exampleZh: preventive maintenance 计划表显示我们需要每 4000 小时更换齿轮箱油。

example: The weekly inspection includes checking all cable connections and listening for unusual noises.
exampleZh: 每周 inspection 包括检查所有线缆连接和听是否有异常噪音。

example: We keep critical spare parts like drives and encoders in stock to minimise downtime.
exampleZh: 我们在库存中保留关键 spare part 如驱动器和编码器以最大限度地减少停机时间。

example: The gripper fingers are a worn part that needs replacement roughly every six months.
exampleZh: gripper finger 是一种 worn part 大约每六个月需要更换。

example: Check the lubrication on all six axes and top up if the grease looks dry.
exampleZh: 检查所有六个轴的 lubrication 如果 grease 看起来干了就补充。

example: Excessive backlash in the joint usually means the gearbox needs to be replaced soon.
exampleZh: joint 中 excessive backlash 通常意味着 gearbox 需要尽快更换。

example: A loose connection on the encoder cable can cause intermittent faults that are very hard to reproduce.
exampleZh: encoder cable 上的 loose connection 可能导致间歇性故障非常难以重现。

example: The cable harness on axis three shows signs of rubbing against the robot frame.
exampleZh: 三轴的 cable harness 显示出与机器人框架摩擦的迹象。

example: Try reseating the connector before ordering a replacement cable because the pins might just be dirty.
exampleZh: 在订购更换线缆之前尝试重新插拔 connector 因为针脚可能只是脏了。

example: Check that the terminals on the motor drive are torqued to the specification on the label.
exampleZh: 检查 motor drive 上的 terminal 是否按标签上的规格拧紧了。

example: Poor grounding can cause noise on the encoder signals leading to erratic robot behaviour.
exampleZh: poor grounding 可能导致 encoder signal 上的 noise 引起 erratic robot behaviour。

example: If the shielding on the signal cable is damaged the encoder feedback will pick up noise from the motor power cables.
exampleZh: 如果 signal cable 的 shielding 损坏 encoder feedback 就会从 motor power cable 中拾取 noise。

example: The fuse on the control cabinet blew and needs to be replaced with the same rating.
exampleZh: 控制柜里的 fuse 烧了需要用同样额定值的更换。

example: The relay that controls the gripper is not clicking so it may need to be replaced.
exampleZh: 控制 gripper 的 relay 没有咔嗒声所以可能需要更换。

example: The main contactor is chattering which usually means the coil voltage is too low.
exampleZh: 主 contactor 在震颤通常意味着线圈电压太低。

example: Someone hit the emergency stop during the shift change and the robot needs to be re-homed.
exampleZh: 有人在换班时按了 emergency stop 机器人需要重新回零。

example: The robot stops instantly when the safety gate opens which is normal behaviour.
exampleZh: safety gate 打开时机器人立即停止这是正常行为。

example: The interlock on the welding cell door must not be bypassed even for testing.
exampleZh: 焊接间的 interlock 即使为测试也不得被 bypass。

example: If the light curtain is triggered during automatic mode the robot must come to an immediate stop.
exampleZh: 如果在自动模式下触发 light curtain 机器人必须立即停止。

example: Can you check the encoder cable on axis four? The position reading jumps when the arm moves fast.
exampleZh: 你能检查一下四轴的 encoder cable 吗？当机械臂快速移动时位置读数会跳变。

example: The proximity sensor is not detecting the part which means either the sensor is dirty or the gap is too large.
exampleZh: proximity sensor 没有检测到工件这意味着要么传感器脏了要么间隙太大。

example: The limit switch at the end of the linear rail is stuck and needs to be freed or replaced.
exampleZh: linear rail 末端的 limit switch 卡住了需要松开或更换。

example: The photoelectric sensor is giving a false reading because the reflector is covered in dust.
exampleZh: photoelectric sensor 给出了错误读数因为反射镜被灰尘覆盖了。

example: The motor on axis one is overheating which suggests the cooling fan might have failed.
exampleZh: 一轴的 motor overheating 这表明 cooling fan 可能已经坏了。

example: Excessive vibration during high-speed moves usually means a bearing or gearbox issue.
exampleZh: 高速运动时的 excessive vibration 通常意味着 bearing 或 gearbox 的问题。

example: The bearing on axis two has been making noise for weeks and needs replacement before it seizes.
exampleZh: 二轴的 bearing 已经响了几个星期需要在卡死之前更换。

example: We replaced the gearbox on axis three last month and the robot has been running smoothly since.
exampleZh: 我们上个月更换了三轴的 gearbox 此后 robot 一直平稳运行。

example: The brake on axis five is not releasing properly which is why the joint cannot move freely.
exampleZh: 五轴的 brake 没有正常释放这就是为什么 joint 不能自由移动。

example: The gripper is jammed and will not open even when we send the manual release command.
exampleZh: gripper jam 了即使我们发送手动释放命令也无法打开。

example: After replacing the motor we need to check the alignment between the motor shaft and the gearbox input.
exampleZh: 更换 motor 后我们需要检查 motor shaft 和 gearbox input 之间的 alignment。

example: The gripper loses vacuum after a few cycles so there might be a leak in the air line.
exampleZh: gripper 运行几个循环后就失去真空所以可能是 air line 有泄漏。

example: The vacuum level drops during the pick which means the suction cup might be worn or cracked.
exampleZh: pick 过程中 vacuum level 下降这意味着 suction cup 可能已磨损或开裂。

example: A small vacuum leak in the hose can cause the part to drop mid-cycle.
exampleZh: hose 中的 small vacuum leak 可能导致工件在 cycle 中间掉落。

example: The air pressure at the gripper is below spec so check the regulator at the valve bank.
exampleZh: gripper 处的 air pressure 低于规格所以检查 valve bank 的 regulator。

example: The tooling needs to be inspected after every 10000 cycles for signs of wear on the contact surfaces.
exampleZh: tooling 需要每 10000 个 cycle 检查接触面的磨损迹象。

example: The commissioning of the new robot took about three days including safety validation and first test runs.
exampleZh: 新机器人的 commissioning 花了大约三天包括安全验证和首次试运行。

example: The robot needs recalibration after we replaced the encoder because the zero position has shifted.
exampleZh: 更换 encoder 后机器人需要 calibration 因为 zero position 已经偏移了。

example: After a battery failure the robot lost its mastering and needs to be re-taught the zero position on each axis.
exampleZh: 电池失效后机器人丢失了 mastering 需要重新示教每个轴的 zero position。

example: If the zero position is off by even half a degree the entire programme will run with an offset.
exampleZh: 如果 zero position 偏移了哪怕半度整个程序都会带着 offset 运行。

example: The I/O module on the gripper is not responding so the robot cannot confirm the part is held.
exampleZh: gripper 上的 I/O 模块没有响应所以机器人无法确认工件被夹持。

example: The safety PLC is not receiving the E-stop status from the robot controller.
exampleZh: 安全 PLC 没有从 robot controller 收到 E-stop 状态。

example: The fieldbus connection dropped for about 200 milliseconds which was enough to trigger a network timeout.
exampleZh: fieldbus 连接断了约 200 毫秒足以触发 network timeout。

example: The network cable between the robot controller and the switch was pinched under a cable tray cover.
exampleZh: robot controller 和 switch 之间的 network cable 被压在 cable tray cover 下。

example: The robot controller has a static IP address so make sure the laptop is on the same subnet.
exampleZh: robot controller 有一个 static IP address 所以确保 laptop 在同一 subnet 上。

example: The overcurrent alarm on axis one suggests either a mechanical bind or a failing motor drive.
exampleZh: 一轴的 overcurrent alarm 表明要么是 mechanical bind 要么是 motor drive 即将失效。

example: The overload warning appears when the robot tries to lift a part heavier than the rated payload.
exampleZh: 当机器人试图举起超过 rated payload 的工件时会出现 overload warning。

example: An undervoltage condition can cause the drives to shut down to protect themselves from damage.
exampleZh: undervoltage 状况可能导致驱动器关闭以保护自身免受损坏。

example: Try to power cycle the controller first before attempting any hardware replacement.
exampleZh: 在尝试任何硬件更换之前先试着 power cycle 控制器。

example: A simple reset cleared the fault and the robot has been running fine for the past two hours.
exampleZh: 一个简单的 reset 清除了 fault 机器人过去两小时一直正常运行。

example: The reboot takes about three minutes and the robot should come back to its home position automatically.
exampleZh: reboot 大约需要三分钟机器人应该自动回到 home position。

example: The breaker for the robot cell tripped during the storm so check if anything else in the panel is affected.
exampleZh: 机器人工作间的 breaker 在暴风雨中跳闸了所以检查一下 panel 中是否还有其他设备受影响。

example: The service report should include all error codes found the actions taken and the parts replaced.
exampleZh: service report 应该包括发现的所有 error code 采取的措施和更换的 parts。

example: The onsite visit is scheduled for Tuesday morning and the customer has cleared access to the robot cell.
exampleZh: onsite visit 安排在周二上午客户已经清除了 robot cell 的通道。

example: We provided remote support via VPN and were able to clear the fault without sending a technician.
exampleZh: 我们通过 VPN 提供了 remote support 能够在不派出技术员的情况下清除 fault。

example: Always take a backup of the robot parameters before making any changes to the configuration.
exampleZh: 在对配置做任何更改之前总是 backup 机器人参数。

example: We restored the previous backup and the robot started working normally again.
exampleZh: 我们 restore 了之前的 backup 机器人又开始正常工作了。

example: The machine has been running without issues for over 8000 hours since the last major service.
exampleZh: 自上次大修以来 machine 已经无故障运行了超过 8000 小时。

example: Check if the wire is damaged where it passes through the cable chain because that is a common failure point.
exampleZh: 检查 wire 在经过 cable chain 的地方是否损坏因为那是一个常见的故障点。

example: The switch on the control panel is not responding so we may need to replace the entire button assembly.
exampleZh: 控制面板上的 switch 没有响应所以我们可能需要更换整个按钮组件。

example: The emergency stop button was pressed during the night shift and nobody recorded it in the log.
exampleZh: 夜班期间有人按了紧急停止 button 但没人在 log 中记录。

example: The power to the robot cell was interrupted for about two seconds during the thunderstorm.
exampleZh: 雷暴期间 robot cell 的 power 中断了大约两秒。

example: The battery in the robot controller needs to be replaced every two years to avoid losing the mastering data.
exampleZh: robot controller 中的 battery 需要每两年更换以避免丢失 mastering 数据。

example: The cooling fan on the control cabinet is making a grinding noise and needs to be replaced soon.
exampleZh: 控制柜上的 cooling fan 发出摩擦噪音需要尽快更换。

example: Keep the cabinet door closed when the robot is running to prevent dust from getting inside.
exampleZh: 机器人运行时保持 cabinet 门关闭以防止灰尘进入。

example: The robot controller shows a green status light which means all systems are operating normally.
exampleZh: robot controller 显示绿色 status light 这意味着所有 systems 运行正常。

example: The teach pendant screen is flickering which might be a loose connection or a failing backlight.
exampleZh: teach pendant screen 在闪烁可能是 loose connection 或 backlight 故障。

example: The red light on the safety relay means the circuit is open and the robot cannot move.
exampleZh: safety relay 上的 red light 意味着 circuit open 机器人不能移动。

example: The robot made an unexpected movement so I hit the stop button and called the technician.
exampleZh: 机器人做了一个意外动作所以我按了 stop button 并叫了技术员。

example: The robot will not start until the safety gate is closed and the reset button is pressed.
exampleZh: 在 safety gate 关闭并按下 reset button 之前机器人不会 start。

example: We need to replace the gearbox on axis three because the backlash is now out of tolerance.
exampleZh: 我们需要 replace 三轴的 gearbox 因为 backlash 现在已经超出了 tolerance。

example: Tighten all the bolts on the robot base every six months because vibration can loosen them over time.
exampleZh: 每六个月 tighten 机器人底座上的所有 bolts 因为 vibration 会随时间使其松动。

example: The loose bolt on the gripper mounting plate caused the entire tool to wobble during high-speed moves.
exampleZh: gripper mounting plate 上的 loose bolt 导致整个 tool 在高速移动时晃动。

example: The broken bearing was found during the routine inspection and replaced before it caused a production stop.
exampleZh: broken bearing 在 routine inspection 中被发现并在导致 production stop 之前更换了。

example: The encoder is reading incorrectly because the optical disc inside is dirty from dust ingress.
exampleZh: encoder 读数不正确因为里面的 optical disc 因灰尘进入而 dirty。

example: The air line to the gripper is blocked which is why the vacuum level is lower than normal.
exampleZh: 到 gripper 的 air line blocked 了这就是为什么真空水平低于正常值。

example: Always use the correct tool when adjusting the robot to avoid damaging the bolts or the frame.
exampleZh: 在调整机器人时总是使用正确的 tool 以避免损坏 bolts 或 frame。

example: The manual says the gearbox oil should be changed every 4000 hours of operation.
exampleZh: manual 说 gearbox oil 应该每运行 4000 小时更换一次。

example: Inspect the cable harness on axis three because the error log shows intermittent communication faults.
exampleZh: 检查三轴的 cable harness 因为错误日志显示间歇性通信故障以便 inspect 问题。

example: We swapped the encoder cable and the fault disappeared immediately.
exampleZh: 我们 swap 了编码器线缆故障立即消失了。

example: We need to isolate the problem to a specific component before ordering replacement parts.
exampleZh: 在订购替换部件之前我们需要把问题 isolate 到特定组件。

example: Try reseating the connector before replacing the entire cable because the contacts might just be dirty.
exampleZh: 在更换整条线缆之前试试 reseat 连接器因为触点可能只是脏了。

example: The fault came back after the robot had been running for about three hours.
exampleZh: 机器人运行了大约三小时后故障 come back 了。

example: The motor shaft is misaligned with the gearbox input which causes excess vibration at high speed.
exampleZh: 电机轴与齿轮箱输入 misaligned 在高速时导致过度振动。

example: The sensor signal drops intermittently for just a few milliseconds which is enough to trigger a stop.
exampleZh: 传感器信号 intermittently 中断仅几毫秒就足以触发停机。

term: Try to power cycle the controller first
example: Try to power cycle the controller first before we start swapping hardware components.
exampleZh: 在我们开始更换硬件组件之前先试试 Try to power cycle the controller first。

example: Please check the encoder cable before we start swapping expensive components.
exampleZh: 在开始更换昂贵组件之前请 check encoder cable。

example: Can you verify the voltage at the motor drive terminals with a multimeter?
exampleZh: 你能用万用表 verify 电机驱动端子上的电压吗？

example: Clean the optical sensor with a lint-free cloth because dust is causing false readings.
exampleZh: 用无绒布 clean 光学传感器因为灰尘导致了错误读数。

example: Unplug the motor connector before you touch any of the terminals on the drive.
exampleZh: 在你接触驱动器上的任何端子之前先 unplug 电机连接器。

example: Turn off the main power before you open the control cabinet.
exampleZh: 在你打开控制柜之前先 turn off 主电源。

example: The robot shut down unexpectedly during the night shift and the operator did not log the event.
exampleZh: 机器人在夜班期间 unexpectedly shut down 操作员没有记录该事件。

example: The motor on axis one feels too hot to touch which is definitely not normal after only an hour of running.
exampleZh: 一轴的电机摸起来太 hot 了运行仅一小时后这绝对不正常。

example: The gearbox on axis three is getting noisy which usually means the bearings are starting to wear.
exampleZh: 三轴的齿轮箱变得 noisy 了这通常意味着轴承开始磨损。

example: The fault came back again after we replaced the cable so it must be the drive itself.
exampleZh: The fault came back again 在我们更换 cable 之后所以一定是驱动器本身的问题。

example: The sensor is not responding at all so check the power supply first before replacing it.
exampleZh: The sensor is not responding 所以先检查电源再考虑更换。

example: The cable looks loose where it enters the connector so try pushing it in firmly first.
exampleZh: The cable looks loose 在进入连接器的地方所以先试着用力推入。

example: The motor is too hot after just twenty minutes of running so the cooling fan may have failed.
exampleZh: The motor is too hot 所以散热风扇可能坏了。

example: We replaced the fuse but it blew again after ten minutes which means there is a short somewhere.
exampleZh: We replaced the fuse 但十分钟后它又 blew 了这说明某处有短路。

term: Try to power cycle it first
example: Try to power cycle it first before we go through the full troubleshooting procedure.
exampleZh: 在我们进行完整的故障排查程序之前先试试 Try to power cycle it first。

example: The alarm cleared after reset and the robot has been running fine for the last hour.
exampleZh: The alarm cleared after reset 机器人过去一小时一直运行正常。

example: Please send the error code so I can look it up in the manual before our call.
exampleZh: Please send the error code 这样我可以在我们通话之前查手册。

example: Measure the voltage at the motor drive terminals before we replace anything.
exampleZh: 在更换任何东西之前先 measure 电机驱动端子上的电压。

example: Restart the robot controller after the power dip and see if the alarm clears.
exampleZh: 电压骤降后 restart robot controller 看看报警是否清除。

example: Lubricate all six axis joints according to the schedule in the maintenance manual.
exampleZh: 根据 maintenance manual 中的计划 lubricate 所有六个轴关节。

example: Plug in the encoder cable firmly until you hear the locking tab click.
exampleZh: plug in 编码器线缆直到听到锁扣咔嗒一声。

example: Turn on the main power and wait for the controller to finish its boot sequence.
exampleZh: turn on 主电源等待控制器完成启动序列。

example: We need to trace the cable from the encoder back to the controller to find the break.
exampleZh: 我们需要从编码器 trace 线缆回到控制器以找到断点。

example: All metal parts of the cabinet must be properly grounded to avoid noise on the signal lines.
exampleZh: 柜子的所有金属部件必须正确 ground 以避免信号线上的 noise。

example: Make sure to shield the encoder cable because it runs right next to the motor power line.
exampleZh: 确保 shield encoder cable 因为它就在 motor power line 旁边走线。

example: Reconnect the network cable and wait for the fieldbus to re-establish communication.
exampleZh: reconnect 网线等待 fieldbus 重新建立通信。

example: You need to acknowledge the alarm before the robot will allow any axis movement.
exampleZh: 在机器人允许任何轴运动之前你需要 acknowledge alarm。

example: Monitor the current draw on axis two while the robot runs at full speed for ten minutes.
exampleZh: 在机器人全速运行十分钟时 monitor 二号轴的电流。

example: Record the error code and the exact time it appeared so we can check the log.
exampleZh: record error code 和它出现的确切时间以便我们检查 log。

example: We need to adjust the zero position on axis five because it is off by about 0.2 degrees.
exampleZh: 我们需要 adjust 五轴的零点因为偏移了大约 0.2 度。

example: Level the robot base before you start the mastering procedure.
exampleZh: 在开始 mastering 程序之前 level 机器人底座。

example: Secure all the bolts on the base frame before the robot goes back into production.
exampleZh: 在机器人恢复生产之前 secure 底座框架上的所有螺栓。

example: Fasten the gripper mounting screws to the torque specified on the label.
exampleZh: 按照标签上指定的扭矩 fasten 夹爪安装螺丝。

example: Remove the old gearbox carefully because the oil inside is still hot.
exampleZh: 小心 remove 旧齿轮箱因为里面的油还很热。

example: Install the new motor and make sure the shaft is aligned before tightening the bolts.
exampleZh: install 新电机确保在拧紧螺栓之前轴已对准。

example: Do not bypass the safety interlock even for testing unless you have written approval.
exampleZh: 即使为了测试也不要 bypass safety interlock 除非你有书面批准。

example: We repaired the drive by replacing the failed capacitor on the power board.
exampleZh: 我们通过更换电源板上的 failed capacitor 来 repair 驱动器。

example: Can you confirm the fault only appears when the robot runs above 80 percent speed.
exampleZh: 你能 confirm 故障只在机器人运行超过百分之八十速度时出现吗。

example: Test the limit switch by manually triggering it and watching the I/O status on the pendant.
exampleZh: 通过手动触发 limit switch 并在 pendant 上观察 I/O 状态来 test 它。

example: We traced back the encoder signal and found a break in the cable near the robot wrist.
exampleZh: 我们 trace back 了编码器信号在靠近机器人手腕处的线缆中发现了一处断路。

example: Look for any signs of rubbing on the cable harness where it passes through the cable chain.
exampleZh: 在 cable harness 经过 cable chain 的地方 look for 摩擦痕迹。

example: Go back to the original settings and see if the problem disappears.
exampleZh: 回到原始设置 go back 看看问题是否消失。

example: The encoder signal keeps dropping out for a few milliseconds which is enough to trigger a stop.
exampleZh: 编码器信号持续 drop out 几毫秒足以触发停机。

example: The alarm cleared up after we replaced the encoder cable which confirms the cable was the issue.
exampleZh: 更换了编码器线缆后 alarm clear up 了这确认线缆就是问题所在。

example: Let the motor cool down for at least thirty minutes before you touch it.
exampleZh: 在你触摸电机之前让 motor cool down 至少三十分钟。

example: The controller starts up normally but then throws an error about two minutes later.
exampleZh: 控制器正常 start up 但大约两分钟后抛出一个错误。

example: Let the pendant boot up completely before you press the reset button.
exampleZh: 让 pendant 完全 boot up 再按 reset 按钮。

example: We swapped out the servo drive and the fault disappeared immediately.
exampleZh: 我们 swap out 了伺服驱动器故障立即消失了。

example: Always back up the robot parameters before making any changes to the configuration.
exampleZh: 在对配置做任何更改之前总是 back up 机器人参数。

example: Lock out the main power before you open the control cabinet.
exampleZh: 在打开控制柜之前 lock out 主电源。

example: Tag out the machine with your name and the time so nobody turns it on while you are inside.
exampleZh: 用你的名字和时间 tag out 机器这样你在里面时没人会开机。

example: Pull out the connector gently and check if any of the pins are bent.
exampleZh: 轻轻 pull out 连接器检查是否有任何针脚弯曲。

example: Check out the alarm history first before we start ordering replacement parts.
exampleZh: 在我们开始订购替换部件之前先 check out alarm history。

example: Pull off the connector cover and check for moisture inside.
exampleZh: pull off 连接器盖检查内部是否有湿气。

example: Hold down the reset button for five seconds until the pendant beeps.
exampleZh: hold down reset 按钮五秒直到 pendant 发出哔声。

example: Let the robot warm up for ten minutes before you run the calibration routine.
exampleZh: 让机器人 warm up 十分钟再运行校准程序。

example: Let us run through the checklist together so we do not miss anything obvious.
exampleZh: 让我们一起 run through 清单以免遗漏任何明显的问题。

example: The fuse burnt out because of a short circuit on the I/O board.
exampleZh: 由于 I/O board 上的 short circuit fuse burn out 了。

example: The joint is stuck and will not move even when we release the brake manually.
exampleZh: joint stuck 了即使我们手动释放制动器也不动。

example: The gripper pads are worn and need to be replaced before the next production run.
exampleZh: 夹爪垫 worn 了需要在下一轮生产前更换。

example: The tool changer is jammed and the robot cannot release the current end effector.
exampleZh: tool changer jammed 了机器人无法释放当前的 end effector。

example: The motor speed is unstable at low RPM which could be a feedback issue.
exampleZh: 电机速度在低 RPM 时 unstable 可能是 feedback 的问题。

example: The fault is intermittent so it is hard to catch but it usually happens after the robot runs for an hour.
exampleZh: 故障是 intermittent 的所以很难捕捉但通常在机器人运行一小时后发生。

example: The drive shut down because it was overheated so check the cooling fan first.
exampleZh: 驱动器因为 overheated 而关闭了所以先检查冷却风扇。

example: The fuse looks burnt and there is a strong smell of burnt plastic near the terminal block.
exampleZh: 保险丝看起来 burnt 了端子排附近有强烈的塑料焦味。

example: The terminals are corroded because of moisture inside the cabinet so we need to fix the seal.
exampleZh: 端子 corroded 了因为柜子内有湿气所以我们需要修好密封。

example: The ground wire is disconnected which explains the noise on the encoder signals.
exampleZh: 地线 disconnected 了这解释了编码器信号上的 noise。

example: Make sure the cabinet frame is properly grounded before powering it on.
exampleZh: 在通电之前确保 cabinet frame 正确 grounded。

example: The signal cable must be shielded to prevent interference from the adjacent power cables.
exampleZh: signal cable 必须 shielded 以防止来自相邻 power cable 的干扰。

example: The area is safe to enter now because the robot is in a full stop state.
exampleZh: 现在进入区域是 safe 的因为机器人处于完全停止状态。

example: Do not enter the cell while the light curtain is triggered because the safety circuit is unsafe in this state.
exampleZh: 在 light curtain 触发时不要进入 cell 因为安全电路在这种状态下 unsafe。

example: The robot is in automatic mode so keep the safety gate closed.
exampleZh: 机器人在 automatic 模式所以保持 safety gate 关闭。

example: This is an onsite repair so bring the spare drive and the calibration tools.
exampleZh: 这是 onsite repair 所以带上备用驱动器和校准工具。

example: The motor feels underpowered and struggles to lift the rated payload.
exampleZh: 电机感觉 underpowered 很难举起额定 payload。

example: Please check the cable on axis four because the encoder reading jumps when it moves fast.
exampleZh: 请 check the cable 四轴因为快速移动时编码器读数跳动。

example: Tighten the connector on the motor drive because a loose connection can cause intermittent faults.
exampleZh: tighten the connector 电机驱动上因为 loose connection 可能导致 intermittent fault。

example: Replace the fuse with the same rating and check if the new one holds.
exampleZh: 用相同额定值 replace the fuse 检查新的是否能保持。

example: First reset the alarm and then observe if the fault comes back immediately or after some time.
exampleZh: 先 reset the alarm 然后观察故障是立即回来还是过一段时间才回来。

example: Please restart the controller and tell me if the pendant shows any error during boot.
exampleZh: 请 restart the controller 告诉我 pendant 在启动过程中是否显示任何 error。

example: Measure the voltage at the input terminals and compare it with the label on the drive.
exampleZh: 在输入端子上 measure the voltage 并与驱动器标签上的值比较。

example: Inspect the harness for any signs of rubbing against the robot frame.
exampleZh: inspect the harness 有没有与机器人框架摩擦的迹象。

example: Clean the sensor with compressed air first and then with a lint-free cloth.
exampleZh: 先用压缩空气再用无绒布 clean the sensor。

example: We swapped the drive and the fault disappeared so the old drive was the problem.
exampleZh: 我们 swap the drive 故障消失了所以旧的驱动器是问题所在。

example: Reseat the connector before ordering a new cable because the pins might just be dirty.
exampleZh: 在订购新线缆之前 reseat the connector 因为针脚可能只是脏了。

example: Clear the alarm and try to jog the axis slowly to see if the fault reappears.
exampleZh: clear the alarm 然后尝试慢慢 jog 轴看看故障是否重新出现。

example: Please record the error code and send it to me so I can look it up in the manual.
exampleZh: 请 record the error code 发给我这样我可以在手册中查找。

example: Can you send the alarm history from the last 24 hours so we can see the sequence.
exampleZh: 你能 send the alarm history 过去 24 小时的吗这样我们可以看序列。

example: Verify the signal with an oscilloscope because the multimeter will not catch a brief dropout.
exampleZh: 用示波器 verify the signal 因为万用表捕捉不到短暂的 dropout。

example: Test the limit switch by pressing it manually while watching the I/O monitor on the pendant.
exampleZh: 在 pendant 上观察 I/O monitor 的同时手动按压来 test the limit switch。

example: We need to align the axis after replacing the motor because the zero position has shifted.
exampleZh: 更换电机后我们需要 align the axis 因为零点偏移了。

example: Calibrate the robot after replacing any mechanical component in the drive train.
exampleZh: 在更换传动链中任何机械组件后 calibrate the robot。

example: We need to isolate the fault to a single component before we can be sure what to replace.
exampleZh: 在确定要更换什么之前我们需要 isolate the fault 到单个组件。

example: Restore the power after confirming all safety gates are closed and the area is clear.
exampleZh: 在确认所有 safety gate 关闭且区域清空后 restore the power。

example: Check the grounding on the control cabinet because poor grounding causes erratic encoder readings.
exampleZh: check the grounding 控制柜因为 poor grounding 会导致 erratic encoder reading。

example: Back up the parameters before you start any troubleshooting so we can always restore them.
exampleZh: 在开始任何故障排查之前 back up the parameters 这样我们随时可以 restore。

example: Please send the error code so I can look it up in the service manual before our call.
exampleZh: Please send the error code.。请 send the error code 这样我可以在通话前在服务手册中查找。

example: The sensor is not responding at all so check the power supply before replacing it.
exampleZh: The sensor is not responding.。传感器完全没有响应所以先检查电源再考虑更换。

example: The cable looks loose where it enters the connector so push it in until it clicks.
exampleZh: The cable looks loose.。在进入连接器的地方线缆看起来松了所以推入直到听到咔嗒声。

example: The motor is too hot after just twenty minutes of running so the cooling fan may have failed.
exampleZh: The motor is too hot.。仅运行二十分钟后电机就太热了所以冷却风扇可能坏了。

example: We replaced the fuse but it blew again after ten minutes which means there is a short circuit somewhere.
exampleZh: We replaced the fuse.。我们换了保险丝但十分钟后又烧了说明某处有短路。

term: Try to power cycle it first.
example: Try to power cycle it first before we go through the full troubleshooting procedure.
exampleZh: Try to power cycle it first.。先试试断电重启再走完整的故障排查程序。

example: The alarm cleared after reset and the robot has been running fine for the last hour.
exampleZh: The alarm cleared after reset.。复位后报警清除了机器人过去一小时一直运行正常。

example: The connector may be loose because the fault only appears when the robot runs at high speed.
exampleZh: The connector may be loose.。连接器可能松了因为故障只在机器人高速运行时出现。

example: The voltage looks too low on the 24-volt supply so check the power supply module.
exampleZh: The voltage looks too low.。24 伏电源上的电压看起来太低了所以检查电源模块。

term: The robot stops near the gate.
shortMeaning: 机器人在门附近停下了
example: The robot stops near the gate every time which suggests an issue with the safety zone setup.
exampleZh: The robot stops near the gate.。机器人每次都在门附近停下说明安全区域设置有问题。

example: The drive is not enabled so check the enable signal from the safety PLC.
exampleZh: The drive is not enabled.。驱动器没有被启用所以检查来自安全 PLC 的启用信号。

example: The sensor keeps dropping out for a few milliseconds which is enough to stop the robot.
exampleZh: The sensor keeps dropping out.。传感器一直断信号几毫秒足以停止机器人。

example: The gripper loses vacuum after a few cycles so check the air line for a leak.
exampleZh: The gripper loses vacuum.。夹爪运行几个循环后失去真空所以检查气管是否有泄漏。

term: The alarm came back after reboot.
example: The alarm came back after reboot which means the fault is not a one-time glitch.
exampleZh: The alarm came back after reboot.。重启后报警又回来了说明故障不是一次性的。

example: Can you check the grounding on the controller because we are seeing noise on all encoder channels.
exampleZh: Can you check the grounding?。能检查一下控制器上的接地吗因为我们在所有编码器通道上都看到了噪声。

example: We need to calibrate the robot after replacing the encoder on axis three.
exampleZh: 更换三轴编码器后我们需要 calibrate 机器人。

example: Align the motor shaft with the gearbox input before tightening the mounting bolts.
exampleZh: 在拧紧安装螺栓之前 align 电机轴与齿轮箱输入。

example: Mount the new motor carefully and make sure the flange sits flush against the gearbox.
exampleZh: 小心地 mount 新电机确保法兰与齿轮箱平齐。

example: Disconnect the main power before you open the panel door.
exampleZh: 在你打开 panel 门之前 disconnect 主电源。

example: Power on the controller and watch the pendant for any error messages during the boot sequence.
exampleZh: power on 控制器在启动过程中观察 pendant 是否有 error 消息。

example: Shut off the robot before performing any mechanical work inside the cell.
exampleZh: 在 cell 内进行任何机械工作之前 shut off 机器人。

example: The cable insulation is damaged where it rubs against the frame so it needs replacing.
exampleZh: 线缆绝缘层在摩擦框架的地方 damaged 了所以需要更换。

example: The remote diagnostic tool shows that the controller has been running for 12000 hours.
exampleZh: remote diagnostic tool 显示控制器已经运行了 12000 小时。

example: Cycle the power to the controller and see if the fault clears after reboot.
exampleZh: cycle 控制器电源看看重启后故障是否清除。

example: We need to diagnose whether the fault is in the drive or the motor before ordering parts.
exampleZh: 在订购部件之前我们需要 diagnose 故障是在驱动器还是电机。

example: Jog the axis slowly and watch the position feedback for any jumps.
exampleZh: 慢慢 jog 轴观察位置反馈是否有跳动。

example: Home all axes after the mastering procedure is complete.
exampleZh: 在 mastering 程序完成后 home 所有轴。

example: You can override the safety signal with a key switch but only for maintenance mode.
exampleZh: 你可以用钥匙开关 override 安全信号但只能在 maintenance 模式下。

example: Release the brake manually and check if the axis moves freely by hand.
exampleZh: 手动 release brake 检查轴是否可以手动自由移动。

example: Log every alarm event with the exact time and axis number for later analysis.
exampleZh: log event 每个报警记录准确的时间和轴号以备后续分析。

example: Check the parameter settings on the drive because the maximum speed might have been changed accidentally.
exampleZh: check parameter 驱动器上的设置因为最大速度可能被意外更改了。

example: We need to tune the gain on axis two because the robot is oscillating at high speed.
exampleZh: 我们需要 tune gain 二号轴因为机器人在高速时在振荡。

example: Replace the timing belt on axis four because it shows signs of cracking.
exampleZh: replace belt 四号轴的同步带因为它显示出开裂的迹象。

example: Drain the old gearbox oil before you refill it with fresh lubricant.
exampleZh: 在用新鲜润滑油重新加注之前 drain oil 旧齿轮箱油。

example: Clean the cooling fan on the drive because dust buildup is causing it to overheat.
exampleZh: clean fan 驱动器上的因为灰尘积聚导致过热。

example: The load must be balanced before the robot can run at full speed.
exampleZh: 负载必须 balanced 才能让机器人全速运行。

example: One of the pins in the connector is bent so the signal is intermittent.
exampleZh: 连接器中的一个针脚 bent 了所以信号是 intermittent 的。

example: The timing belt is cracked in several places and needs to be replaced immediately.
exampleZh: 同步带在好几处 cracked 了需要立即更换。

example: The gearbox is leaking oil from the input shaft seal.
exampleZh: 齿轮箱从输入轴密封处 leaking 油。

example: The main breaker is tripped so check if anything shorted in the cabinet.
exampleZh: 主断路器 tripped 了所以检查柜子里是否有短路。

example: The bearing is seized and the axis cannot turn at all even with the brake released.
exampleZh: 轴承 seized 了即使制动器释放了轴也完全无法转动。

example: The roller has a flat spot from wear which causes vibration at high speed.
exampleZh: 滚轮有一个 flat spot 由磨损引起导致高速时振动。

example: Retighten the mounting bolts every three months because vibration loosens them.
exampleZh: 每三个月 retighten 安装螺栓因为振动会让它们松动。

example: We rewired the motor phases because the original wiring was picking up noise.
exampleZh: 我们 rewire 了 motor phases 因为原来的接线引入了 noise。

example: Torque down the joint bolts to 25 Newton metres exactly as the manual specifies.
exampleZh: 按手册规定将 joint bolts torque down 到精确 25 牛顿米。

example: We flashed the latest firmware to the motor driver and the communication error went away.
exampleZh: 我们 flash 了 motor driver 的最新固件 communication error 消失了。

example: Ping the controller from the main computer to check if the network link is up.
exampleZh: 从主计算机 ping 控制器检查 network link 是否 up。

example: Air-blow the inside of the control cabinet every six months to remove dust.
exampleZh: 每六个月 air-blow 控制柜内部以清除灰尘。

example: Grease the linear rails every 500 hours of operation according to the schedule.
exampleZh: 根据计划每 500 运行小时 grease 线性导轨。

example: We backdrove the joint by hand to feel if there was unusual friction or grinding.
exampleZh: 我们用手 backdrive joint 来感受是否有 unusual friction 或 grinding。

example: We scoped the encoder signal and found that one channel was missing pulses.
exampleZh: 我们 scope 了 encoder signal 发现一个通道 missing pulses。

example: We meggered the motor windings to check the insulation resistance after the short.
exampleZh: 在短路后我们 megger 了 motor windings 检查 insulation resistance。

example: The robot went down again last night and the log shows the same encoder fault.
exampleZh: robot 昨晚又 go down 了 log 显示了同样的 encoder fault。

example: The gripper started acting up after about three hours of continuous operation.
exampleZh: act up。gripper 在连续运行大约三小时后 start acting up。

example: The gripper pads wear down after about 10000 cycles and need replacing.
exampleZh: gripper pads 在大约 10000 次循环后 wear down 需要更换。

example: We tightened up all the terminal screws and the intermittent connection stopped.
exampleZh: 我们 tighten up 了所有 terminal screws intermittent connection 停止了。

example: Log in to the robot controller remotely and check the fault history.
exampleZh: 远程 log in 到 robot controller 查看 fault history。

example: Pull up the error log from last night and check if there were any overcurrent faults.
exampleZh: pull up 昨晚的 error log 检查是否有任何 overcurrent faults。

example: We swapped in a spare motor driver and the axis moved normally again.
exampleZh: 我们 swap in 了一个 spare motor driver axis 又正常移动了。

example: We called up the manufacturer support line and they walked us through the reset.
exampleZh: 我们 call up 了 manufacturer support line 他们引导我们完成了 reset。

example: The overloaded motor tripped the breaker after about ten seconds of peak torque.
exampleZh: overloaded motor 在 peak torque 约十秒后 tripped the breaker。

example: The shorted winding was causing the drive to trip immediately on power-up.
exampleZh: shorted winding 导致 drive 在通电后 immediately trip。

example: The fried capacitor on the board is visible with a brown burn mark around it.
exampleZh: board 上 fried capacitor 可见周围有 brown burn mark。

example: The dusty fan filter was blocking airflow and the controller temperature was rising.
exampleZh: dusty fan filter 阻塞了 airflow controller temperature 在上升。

example: The miswired phases caused the motor to spin in the wrong direction.
exampleZh: miswired phases 导致 motor 向 wrong direction spin。

example: The out-of-alignment coupling was causing vibration and premature bearing wear.
exampleZh: out-of-alignment coupling 引起了 vibration 和 premature bearing wear。

example: Clear the fault from the controller and then try to home the axis again.
exampleZh: 从 controller clear the fault 然后再次尝试 home the axis。

example: Pull the logs from the last 24 hours and email them to the support engineer.
exampleZh: pull the logs 从最近 24 小时并通过 email 发给 support engineer。

example: Check the wiring from the encoder to the drive because the signal looks noisy.
exampleZh: check the wiring 从 encoder 到 drive 因为 signal 看起来 noisy。

example: We replaced the part under warranty and the machine was back up in two hours.
exampleZh: 我们在 warranty 内 replace the part machine 在两小时内恢复运行。

example: Run a diagnostic on the servo drive to check for any hidden fault codes.
exampleZh: 在 servo drive 上 run a diagnostic 检查任何 hidden fault codes。

example: Tighten the bolts on the base plate because vibration loosens them over time.
exampleZh: tighten the bolts 在 base plate 上因为 vibration 会随时间松动它们。

example: Test the sensor by placing an object in front of it and watching the signal.
exampleZh: 通过将一个物体放在它前面并观察 signal 来 test the sensor。

example: We ordered a spare motor driver to keep on the shelf for quick replacement.
exampleZh: 我们 order a spare motor driver 放在架子上以备 quick replacement。

example: We updated the firmware on all six drives to fix a known communication bug.
exampleZh: 我们在所有六个 drive 上 update the firmware 以修复已知的 communication bug。

example: Check the manual for the correct torque setting before tightening the bolt.
exampleZh: 在 tightening the bolt 之前 check the manual 查看 correct torque setting。

example: Reboot the controller after the firmware update and verify all axes respond.
exampleZh: 在 firmware update 后 reboot the controller 并 verify all axes respond。

example: We isolated the problem to the third axis by swapping drives between joints.
exampleZh: 我们通过交换 joints 之间的 drives 来 isolate the problem 到第三 axis。

term: The fault comes back after a few hours.
shortMeaning: 故障几小时后又回来了
example: The fault comes back after a few hours which suggests a thermal issue.
exampleZh: The fault comes back after a few hours.。故障几小时后又回来了这说明是 thermal issue。

term: Have you tried power cycling it.
example: Have you tried power cycling it because that fixes most communication errors.
exampleZh: Have you tried power cycling it.。你试过 power cycling 它吗因为这能解决大部分 communication errors。

term: Can you send a photo of the error screen.
shortMeaning: 能发张错误屏幕的照片吗
example: Can you send a photo of the error screen so I can see the exact fault code.
exampleZh: Can you send a photo of the error screen.。能发张 error screen 的照片吗这样我能看到确切的 fault code。

term: The motor is making a grinding noise.
example: The motor is making a grinding noise and the current draw is higher than normal.
exampleZh: The motor is making a grinding noise.。motor 发出 grinding noise current draw 比 normal 高。

term: We need to order a replacement part.
example: We need to order a replacement part because the current one is worn beyond the limit.
exampleZh: We need to order a replacement part.。得订 replacement part 因为当前的已经磨损超过了 limit。

term: The error code points to a communication loss.
example: The error code points to a communication loss between the controller and the drive.
exampleZh: The error code points to a communication loss.。error code 指向 controller 和 drive 之间的 communication loss。

term: Can you measure the voltage at the terminal.
example: Can you measure the voltage at the terminal and tell me what reading you get.
exampleZh: Can you measure the voltage at the terminal.。能量一下 terminal 的 voltage 告诉我读数是多少。

term: The sensor reading is jumping around.
example: The sensor reading is jumping around wildly and the controller cannot lock on.
exampleZh: The sensor reading is jumping around.。sensor reading 疯狂 jumping around controller 无法 lock on。

term: Let me check the service history.
example: Let me check the service history to see if this fault was reported before.
exampleZh: Let me check the service history.。让我查一下 service history 看看这个 fault 之前是否报告过。

term: The replacement will take about a week.
example: The replacement will take about a week because the part ships from the overseas warehouse.
exampleZh: The replacement will take about a week.。更换大约需要一周因为部件要从海外仓库 ship。

example: Is the emergency stop released because the controller will not start if any e-stop is pressed.
exampleZh: Is the emergency stop released.。急停释放了吗因为任何 e-stop 被按下 controller 都不会 start。

term: The fault cleared after the reboot.
example: The fault cleared after the reboot and the robot has been running fine for an hour.
exampleZh: The fault cleared after the reboot.。reboot 后 fault cleared robot 已经正常运行了一个小时。

example: We troubleshooted the issue for two hours before finding the loose connector.
exampleZh: 我们 troubleshoot 了这个问题两个小时才找到 loose connector。

example: If you cannot fix it within an hour escalate the issue to the engineering team.
exampleZh: 如果一小时内无法修复 escalate the issue 到 engineering team。

example: Document every repair step so the next technician knows what was done.
exampleZh: document 每个 repair step 这样下一个 technician 知道做了什么。

example: Pre-tension the belt to 80 Newtons before locking the motor mount.
exampleZh: 在锁紧 motor mount 之前 pre-tension the belt 到 80 Newtons。

example: Wipe down the linear guides with a clean cloth before applying fresh grease.
exampleZh: 在涂抹 fresh grease 之前用 clean cloth wipe down the linear guides。

example: Listen to the motor while it runs at low speed to hear any unusual clicking.
exampleZh: 当 motor 低速运行时 listen 听是否有 unusual clicking。

example: If you smell burning from the control cabinet shut off the power immediately.
exampleZh: 如果你从 control cabinet smell burning immediately shut off the power。

example: The spindle cut out in the middle of the cycle and the controller showed an overcurrent fault.
exampleZh: spindle 在 cycle 中间 cut out controller 显示了 overcurrent fault。

example: The motor heats up to over 80 degrees after about 30 minutes of continuous running.
exampleZh: motor 在连续运行约 30 分钟后 heat up 到超过 80 度。

example: We put back the original drive after the replacement did not fix the fault.
exampleZh: 在 replacement 没有 fix the fault 后我们 put back 了 original drive。

example: We run a health check on all robots every Monday morning before the shift starts.
exampleZh: 我们在每班开始前的周一早上对所有 robots run a health check。

example: Follow the procedure exactly as written because skipping steps can damage the equipment.
exampleZh: follow the procedure。严格按 written procedure 操作因为 skipping steps 可能会 damage the equipment。

example: We track the downtime for every machine to identify the most frequent failures.
exampleZh: 我们 track the downtime 每台 machine 以找出 most frequent failures。

term: Can you try a different cable.
example: Can you try a different cable because a bad cable is the most common cause of this error.
exampleZh: Can you try a different cable.。能换根 different cable 试试吗因为 bad cable 是这个 error 最常见的原因。

term: Check if the cooling fan is spinning.
shortMeaning: 检查散热风扇是否在转
example: Check if the cooling fan is spinning because an overheated drive will shut down.
exampleZh: Check if the cooling fan is spinning.。检查 cooling fan 是否在转因为 overheated drive 会 shut down。

term: The same fault happened last month.
shortMeaning: 上个月也发生过同样的故障
example: The same fault happened last month and the root cause was never properly fixed.
exampleZh: The same fault happened last month.。上个月也发生过同样的 fault root cause 从未被 properly fixed。

term: We replaced this part two weeks ago.
shortMeaning: 两周前刚换过这个零件
example: We replaced this part two weeks ago so the new one might be defective.
exampleZh: We replaced this part two weeks ago.。两周前刚换过这个 part 所以新的可能是 defective。

example: We spec out every feature before the engineering team starts building.
exampleZh: 在 engineering team 开始 build 之前我们 spec out 每个 feature。

example: We fleshed out the PRD with concrete use cases and edge case examples.
exampleZh: 我们用 concrete use cases 和 edge case examples flesh out 了 PRD。

example: We booked in a training session for the enterprise client next Tuesday.
exampleZh: 我们为 enterprise client book in 了下周二的 training session。

example: We ruled out the prompt as the cause because the same issue happens with different prompts.
exampleZh: 我们 rule out 了 prompt 是原因因为 different prompts 也出现同样的问题。

example: We opened up the beta to all users after two weeks of internal testing.
exampleZh: 在两周 internal testing 后我们向所有用户 open up 了 beta。

example: We looped in the security team when the feature started handling user payment data.
exampleZh: 当 feature 开始 handle user payment data 时我们 loop in 了 security team。

example: The chatty model gives three paragraphs when a single sentence would be enough.
exampleZh: chatty 模型在 single sentence 就够的情况下给出 three paragraphs。

example: The information in the PDF is not easily extractable because it is scanned images.
exampleZh: PDF 中的信息不太 extractable 因为是 scanned images。

example: The brittle prompt works for this exact wording but fails with any small change.
exampleZh: brittle prompt 对这个 exact wording 有效但任何 small change 就 fail。

example: We do a sanity check on the model output before every release to catch obvious regressions.
exampleZh: 我们在每次 release 前 do a sanity check 模型输出以 catch obvious regressions。

example: We shipped a fix for the hallucination issue within 24 hours of discovering it.
exampleZh: 我们在发现 hallucination issue 后 24 小时内 ship a fix。

example: We pull the metrics every Monday to see how the new model compares to the old one.
exampleZh: 我们每周一 pull the metrics 看新模型与旧模型相比如何。

term: The accuracy dropped after the last update.
shortMeaning: 上次更新后准确率下降了
example: The accuracy dropped after the last update and we need to find which change caused it.
exampleZh: The accuracy dropped after the last update.。上次 update 后 accuracy dropped 我们需要找到是哪个 change 造成的。

term: The context window is too small for this task.
shortMeaning: 上下文窗口对这个任务太小
example: The context window is too small for this task and the model loses track of early messages.
exampleZh: The context window is too small for this task.。context window 对这个任务太小了 model loses track of early messages。

term: We need a clearer definition of done.
shortMeaning: 需要更清晰的完成定义
example: We need a clearer definition of done before the engineering team can estimate the work.
exampleZh: We need a clearer definition of done.。在 engineering team estimate work 之前需要更清晰的 definition of done。

term: This edge case breaks the current workflow.
shortMeaning: 这个边缘案例破坏了当前流程
example: This edge case breaks the current workflow and we did not catch it in testing.
exampleZh: This edge case breaks the current workflow.。这个 edge case 破坏了当前 workflow we did not catch it in testing。

example: Strip about five millimetres of insulation from the wire before crimping the terminal.
exampleZh: 在 crimp the terminal 之前 strip 大约五毫米的 insulation 从 wire 上。

example: Crimp the terminal onto the wire and tug it gently to make sure it is secure.
exampleZh: crimp the terminal 到 wire 上轻轻 tug 以确保 secure。

example: We soldered the broken connection on the PCB and the board worked again.
exampleZh: 我们 solder 了 PCB 上的 broken connection board 又工作了。

example: Loosen the four mounting screws before trying to slide the motor out.
exampleZh: 在尝试 slide the motor out 之前 loosen the four mounting screws。

example: Make sure the connector is fully seated before powering the system back on.
exampleZh: seat。在重新 powering the system 之前确保 connector fully seated。

example: Tail the log file in real time while the operator runs the failing sequence.
exampleZh: 当 operator runs the failing sequence 时 real-time tail the log file。

example: The transformer hums loudly and the pitch changes when the robot moves.
exampleZh: transformer 大声 hum pitch 在 robot moves 时 changes。

example: The gripper rattles when it closes quickly and the sound is getting worse.
exampleZh: gripper 在 quickly closes 时 rattle 声音越来越 worse。

example: The repair was pushed back by two days because the spare part is out of stock.
exampleZh: repair 被 push back 了两天因为 spare part out of stock。

example: We patched up the cable with electrical tape until the replacement arrives.
exampleZh: 我们用 electrical tape patch up 了 cable 直到 replacement arrives。

example: Screw in the bolt by hand first and then torque it to the specification.
exampleZh: 先用手 screw in the bolt 然后 torque it 到 specification。

example: The frayed cable jacket is exposing the inner wires which is a safety hazard.
exampleZh: frayed cable jacket 暴露了 inner wires 这是 safety hazard。

example: The noisy-at-speed bearing needs to be replaced before it seizes completely.
exampleZh: noisy-at-speed bearing 需要被 replaced 在它 completely seizes 之前。

example: The torque-striped bolt head cannot be removed with a normal wrench now.
exampleZh: torque-striped bolt head 现在无法用 normal wrench removed。

example: Wipe the surface of the linear rail with a lint-free cloth before applying oil.
exampleZh: 在涂 oil 之前用 lint-free cloth wipe the surface of the linear rail。

example: We scheduled a service for next month to check all six robots in the cell.
exampleZh: 我们 schedule a service 下个月检查 cell 中所有六台 robots。

term: The vibration gets worse at higher speed.
example: The vibration gets worse at higher speed and the whole table starts to shake.
exampleZh: The vibration gets worse at higher speed.。速度越高 vibration 越厉害整个 table 开始 shake。

term: Did you check the power supply voltage.
example: Did you check the power supply voltage because a low voltage can cause all kinds of faults.
exampleZh: Did you check the power supply voltage.。你查过 power supply voltage 吗因为 low voltage 会导致 all kinds of faults。

term: The machine has been running fine all week.
shortMeaning: 这台机器整周运行正常
example: The machine has been running fine all week and the maintenance logs look clean.
exampleZh: The machine has been running fine all week.。这台 machine 整周 running fine maintenance logs 看起来 clean。

example: De-energize the entire cell and verify with a meter before touching any busbar.
exampleZh: 在触碰任何 busbar 之前 de-energize the entire cell 并用 meter verify。

example: Bleed the air from the cylinder before disconnecting the fitting.
exampleZh: 在断开 fitting 之前 bleed the air from the cylinder。

example: Vent the pressure tank slowly and wait until the gauge reads zero.
exampleZh: slowly vent the pressure tank 等到 gauge reads zero。

example: Drain the hydraulic oil into a clean container before replacing the filter.
exampleZh: 在更换 filter 之前 drain the hydraulic oil 到 clean container。

example: Silence the buzzer first and then read the fault code from the display.
exampleZh: 先 silence the buzzer 然后从 display 读取 fault code。

example: Flush the hydraulic line with clean oil until the old dark oil is completely out.
exampleZh: 用 clean oil flush the hydraulic line 直到 old dark oil completely out。

example: Seal the connector with silicone to prevent water from getting into the pins.
exampleZh: 用 silicone seal the connector 以防止水进入 pins。

example: We patched the air hose with tape until the replacement hose arrives tomorrow.
exampleZh: 我们用 tape patch the air hose 直到 replacement hose 明天到。

example: We jumpered the safety relay to test if the fault was in the relay itself.
exampleZh: 我们 jumper the safety relay 来测试 fault 是否在 relay itself。

example: Photograph the wiring before you disconnect anything so we have a reference.
exampleZh: 在你断开任何东西之前 photograph the wiring 这样我们有 reference。

example: Label each cable at both ends before routing it through the cable chain.
exampleZh: 在通过 cable chain 之前 label each cable at both ends。

example: Route the encoder cable away from the motor power wires to avoid noise.
exampleZh: 将 encoder cable route away from motor power wires 以避免 noise。

example: Clamp the cable every 30 centimetres along the cable chain to prevent sagging.
exampleZh: 沿 cable chain 每隔 30 centimetres clamp the cable 以防止下垂。

example: Energize the system only after everyone has cleared the cell and the gate is closed.
exampleZh: 只有在所有人都 cleared the cell 且 gate closed 后才 energize the system。

example: We wired up the new sensor and checked the signal on the oscilloscope.
exampleZh: 我们 wire up 了新 sensor 并在 oscilloscope 上 checked the signal。

example: Bolt down the motor before testing because it will jump when torque is applied.
exampleZh: 在测试前 bolt down the motor 因为 torque 施加时会 jump。

example: We hooked up the laptop to the controller to download the fault history.
exampleZh: 我们将 laptop hook up 到 controller 以下载 fault history。

example: Blow out the dust from the cooling fan with compressed air every month.
exampleZh: 每月用 compressed air blow out the dust from the cooling fan。

example: The contactor burned up because the contacts were pitted and the resistance was high.
exampleZh: 因为 contacts pitted 且 resistance high contactor burn up 了。

example: Feed the cable through the conduit carefully so you do not nick the insulation.
exampleZh: feed through。carefully feed the cable through the conduit 这样你不会 nick the insulation。

example: The belt snapped back when we released the tensioner and almost hit my hand.
exampleZh: snap back。当我们 release the tensioner 时 belt snapped back 差点 hit my hand。

example: Tap on the relay gently with a screwdriver handle and see if the contact closes.
exampleZh: 用 screwdriver handle gently tap on the relay 看看 contact 是否 closes。

example: The pinched cable has a flat spot where it was caught in the door seal.
exampleZh: pinched cable 有一个 flat spot 在那里被 door seal caught。

example: The clogged filter is restricting airflow and the cylinder moves too slowly.
exampleZh: clogged filter 限制了 airflow cylinder moves too slowly。

example: The unplugged encoder cable was hidden behind the cable chain and took an hour to find.
exampleZh: unplugged encoder cable 藏在 cable chain 后面花了一个小时才找到。

example: The unseated connector looked fine from the outside but was not making contact.
exampleZh: unseated connector 从外面看起来 fine 但实际上没有 making contact。

example: The blown fuse has a visible gap in the wire and the glass is darkened.
exampleZh: blown fuse 有一条 visible gap in the wire 玻璃也 darkened。

example: The low-pressure alarm triggers when the air supply drops below five bar.
exampleZh: 当 air supply drops below five bar 时 low-pressure alarm triggers。

example: The out-of-tolerance position reading means the encoder needs recalibration.
exampleZh: out-of-tolerance position reading 意味着 encoder needs recalibration。

example: The hard-to-reach connector behind the gearbox takes two hours to access.
exampleZh: gearbox 后面 hard-to-reach connector 要花两个小时才能 access。

example: The machine is safe-to-restart after we replaced the guard and tested the interlock.
exampleZh: 在我们 replaced the guard 并 tested the interlock 后 machine 是 safe-to-restart 的。

example: Lock out the power at the main disconnect and keep the key in your pocket.
exampleZh: 在 main disconnect 处 lock out the power 将 key 放在你的口袋里。

example: Bleed the air line before disconnecting the quick-connect fitting.
exampleZh: 在断开 quick-connect fitting 之前 bleed the air line。

example: Trace the cable from end to end to find where the insulation is damaged.
exampleZh: 从一端到另一端 trace the cable 以找到 insulation 在哪里 damaged。

example: Crimp the connector onto the wire and tug gently to confirm it is secure.
exampleZh: crimp the connector。将 connector crimp 到 wire 上轻轻 tug 以确认 secure。

example: Route the harness through the cable chain with enough slack for the full range of motion.
exampleZh: 通过 cable chain route the harness 留出足够 slack 以适应 full range of motion。

example: Grease the bearing every 500 hours with the specified lithium-based grease.
exampleZh: grease the bearing。每 500 小时用指定的 lithium-based grease 给 bearing grease。

example: Flush the line with clean fluid until there is no sign of contamination.
exampleZh: 用 clean fluid flush the line 直到没有 contamination 的迹象。

example: Log the fault in the maintenance system with the exact error code and timestamp.
exampleZh: 用确切的 error code 和 timestamp 在 maintenance system 中 log the fault。

example: Label the wire at both ends so the next technician knows what it connects to.
exampleZh: 给线的两端 label the wire 这样下一个 technician 就知道它 connect 到哪里。

example: We ordered the spare part this morning and it should arrive by Thursday.
exampleZh: 我们今早 order the spare part 应在周四前 arrive。

example: If the fault persists after the second repair escalate the issue to engineering.
exampleZh: 如果在第二次 repair 后 fault 仍然存在 escalate the issue to engineering。

example: Check the fuse with a multimeter before assuming the drive is dead.
exampleZh: 在假设 drive 已 dead 之前用 multimeter check the fuse。

example: Test the emergency stop at the start of every shift to confirm it works.
exampleZh: 每班开始时 test the emergency stop 以确认其 work。

term: Lock out the power before you open the panel.
shortMeaning: 打开面板前先锁定电源
example: Lock out the power before you open the panel because the busbar has 480 volts.
exampleZh: Lock out the power before you open the panel.。打开面板前先 lock out the power 因为 busbar 有 480 volts。

term: The air line is leaking near the fitting.
example: The air line is leaking near the fitting and you can hear it hissing from across the room.
exampleZh: The air line is leaking near the fitting.。air line 在 fitting 附近 leaking 你能从房间另一边听到 hissing。

term: The cable is pinched where it goes through the door.
shortMeaning: 线缆在穿过门的地方被夹了
example: The cable is pinched where it goes through the door and the insulation is flattened.
exampleZh: The cable is pinched where it goes through the door.。cable 在 through the door 的地方被 pinched insulation 被压扁了。

term: The connector was not fully seated.
shortMeaning: 连接器没有完全插到位
example: The connector was not fully seated and the intermittent contact caused the fault.
exampleZh: The connector was not fully seated.。connector 没有 fully seated intermittent contact 导致了 fault。

term: The drive is not enabled after the reboot.
shortMeaning: 重启后驱动器没有使能
example: The drive is not enabled after the reboot and the status LED is blinking red.
exampleZh: The drive is not enabled after the reboot.。reboot 后 drive 没有 enabled status LED 在 blinking red。

term: The same alarm came back after ten minutes.
shortMeaning: 同样的报警十分钟后又回来了
example: The same alarm came back after ten minutes so the root cause is still there.
exampleZh: The same alarm came back after ten minutes.。同样的 alarm 十分钟后又回来了所以 root cause 仍然存在。

term: Can you take a photo of the wiring for me.
shortMeaning: 能帮我拍张接线的照片吗
example: Can you take a photo of the wiring for me so I can see the terminal markings.
exampleZh: Can you take a photo of the wiring for me.。能帮我拍张 wiring 的照片吗这样我能看到 terminal markings。

term: The emergency stop works normally when tested.
example: The emergency stop works normally when tested and all axes stop within half a second.
exampleZh: The emergency stop works normally when tested.。当 tested 时 emergency stop works normally 所有 axes 在半秒内 stop。

term: The relay is not clicking when the output turns on.
shortMeaning: 输出打开时继电器没有咔嗒声
example: The relay is not clicking when the output turns on and the coil voltage reads zero.
exampleZh: The relay is not clicking when the output turns on.。当 output turns on 时 relay 没有 clicking coil voltage reads zero。

term: We need to reroute this harness away from the motor.
shortMeaning: 得把这束线重新布置离电机远点
example: We need to reroute this harness away from the motor because it is picking up noise.
exampleZh: We need to reroute this harness away from the motor.。得把这束 harness reroute 离 motor 远点因为它在 picking up noise。

term: The pressure drops when the cylinder extends.
example: The pressure drops when the cylinder extends and the movement becomes slow and jerky.
exampleZh: The pressure drops when the cylinder extends.。当 cylinder extends 时 pressure drops movement 变得 slow and jerky。

term: The fuse looks fine but check it with a meter.
shortMeaning: 保险丝看起来没事但用万用表量一下
example: The fuse looks fine but check it with a meter because it can look good and still be open.
exampleZh: The fuse looks fine but check it with a meter.。fuse 看起来 fine 但用 meter check it 因为可以 look good 但仍然是 open。
